meta.summary: ABRicate 1.4.0 runtime for screening assembled contigs against bundled antimicrobial resistance and virulence gene databases.
meta.description: ABRicate 1.4.0 runtime for screening assembled contigs against bundled antimicrobial resistance and virulence gene databases.

test: abricate --version 2>&1 | grep -Fx 'abricate 1.4.0' >/dev/null && abricate --help 2>&1 | grep -F 'Find and collate' >/dev/null && abricate-get_db --help 2>&1 | grep -F 'Download databases for abricate' >/dev/null && abricate --check 2>&1 | grep -F 'OK.' >/dev/null && abricate --list > /tmp/taf-abricate-list-$$.tsv && grep -F 'DATABASE' /tmp/taf-abricate-list-$$.tsv >/dev/null && grep -E '^ncbi[[:space:]]' /tmp/taf-abricate-list-$$.tsv >/dev/null && grep -E '^card[[:space:]]' /tmp/taf-abricate-list-$$.tsv >/dev/null && grep -E '^resfinder[[:space:]]' /tmp/taf-abricate-list-$$.tsv >/dev/null && grep -E '^vfdb[[:space:]]' /tmp/taf-abricate-list-$$.tsv >/dev/null && rm -f /tmp/taf-abricate-list-$$.tsv

micromamba list -n base | grep -E 'abricate[[:space:]]+1\.4\.0[[:space:]]+' >/dev/null && micromamba list -n base | grep -E 'blast[[:space:]]+2\.16\.0[[:space:]]+' >/dev/null && blastn -version 2>&1 | grep -F 'blastn: 2.16.0+' >/dev/null && blastx -version 2>&1 | grep -F 'blastx: 2.16.0+' >/dev/null && makeblastdb -version 2>&1 | grep -F 'makeblastdb: 2.16.0+' >/dev/null && blastdbcmd -version 2>&1 | grep -F 'blastdbcmd: 2.16.0+' >/dev/null && command -v any2fasta >/dev/null && { any2fasta -h 2>&1 || true; } | grep -iF 'any2fasta' >/dev/null && perl -MBio::SeqIO -MBio::Seq -MJSON -MPath::Tiny -MList::MoreUtils -MFile::Fetch -MLWP::Protocol::https -e 'print q(perl-deps-ok)' | grep -F 'perl-deps-ok' >/dev/null && gzip --version 2>&1 | grep -F 'gzip' >/dev/null && unzip -v 2>&1 | grep -F 'UnZip' >/dev/null

tmp=/tmp/taf-abricate-tiny-$$; rm -rf "$tmp"; mkdir -p "$tmp/db/tinyamr"; cp /opt/abricate/share/testdata/tinyamr/sequences "$tmp/db/tinyamr/sequences"; cp /opt/abricate/share/testdata/tinyamr/query.fa "$tmp/query.fa"; abricate --setupdb --datadir "$tmp/db" > "$tmp/setup.log" 2>&1; abricate --datadir "$tmp/db" --db tinyamr --minid 90 --mincov 90 "$tmp/query.fa" > "$tmp/out.tsv" 2> "$tmp/run.log"; test -s "$tmp/out.tsv"; grep -F '#FILE' "$tmp/out.tsv" >/dev/null; grep -F 'tafA' "$tmp/out.tsv" >/dev/null; grep -F 'tinyamr' "$tmp/out.tsv" >/dev/null; grep -F 'beta_lactam' "$tmp/out.tsv" >/dev/null; abricate --summary "$tmp/out.tsv" > "$tmp/summary.tsv"; grep -F 'NUM_FOUND' "$tmp/summary.tsv" >/dev/null; grep -F 'tafA' "$tmp/summary.tsv" >/dev/null; rm -rf "$tmp"

tmp=/tmp/taf-abricate-fofn-$$; rm -rf "$tmp"; mkdir -p "$tmp/db/tinyamr"; cp /opt/abricate/share/testdata/tinyamr/sequences "$tmp/db/tinyamr/sequences"; cp /opt/abricate/share/testdata/tinyamr/query.fa "$tmp/query.fa"; abricate --setupdb --datadir "$tmp/db" > "$tmp/setup.log" 2>&1; gzip -c "$tmp/query.fa" > "$tmp/query.fa.gz"; printf '%s\n' "$tmp/query.fa.gz" > "$tmp/fofn.txt"; abricate --datadir "$tmp/db" --db tinyamr --fofn "$tmp/fofn.txt" --csv --nopath > "$tmp/out.csv" 2> "$tmp/run.log"; test -s "$tmp/out.csv"; head -n 1 "$tmp/out.csv" | grep -F '#FILE,SEQUENCE,START' >/dev/null; grep -F 'query.fa.gz' "$tmp/out.csv" >/dev/null; grep -F 'tafA' "$tmp/out.csv" >/dev/null; rm -rf "$tmp"

upstream.name: ABRicate
upstream.license: GPL-2.0-only; bundled database snapshots retain their source database terms and citation requirements
upstream.citation: Seemann T. ABRicate. https://github.com/tseemann/abricate; cite the selected database used with --db according to upstream guidance.
